mapper.select: SELECT tmp.*, su1.username as createUserName, su2.username as updateUserName FROM (SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) AS tmp left join sys_user as su1 on tmp.create_id = su1.id left join sys_user as su2 on tmp.update_id = su2.id WHERE tmp.username = #{username} AND tmp.nick_name = #{nickName} and tmp.deleted = '1'

select su.*, su1.username as createUserName, su2.username as updateUserName from sys_user as su left join sys_user as su1 on su.create_id = su1.id left join sys_user as su2 on su.update_id = su2.id where su.deleted = '1'

select su.id as id, su.username as username, su.phone as phone, su.nick_name as nickName, su.real_name as realName, su.sex as sex, su.status as status, su.email as email, su.avatar as avatar from sys_user as su where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user
id, username, password, phone, real_name, nick_name, email, status, sex, deleted, create_id, update_id, create_where, create_time, update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createWhere,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into sys_user(id, username, password, phone, email, nick_name, real_name, sex, create_where, status, create_id, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{nickName}, #{realName}, #{sex}, #{createWhere}, #{status}, #{createId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update sys_user
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_id = #{createId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_id = #{updateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_where = #{createWhere,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update sys_user set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_id = #{createId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_id = #{updateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_where = #{createWhere,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update sys_user set deleted=0, update_time=now() where id in
#{userId}
update sys_user set password = #{pwd}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_user set password = #{newPwd}, update_time = now() where username = #{name}
update sys_user set avatar=#{resKey} where id = #{userid}
